sentiment: Extreme Fear (CNN F&G ~15, Crypto F&G 10). S&P 500 at 6,506 on Mar 20 close, now below both 50-day MA (6,857) AND 200-day MA (6,621) — deepening bearish structure. Iran war + Strait of Hormuz disruption: WTI $98.23, reports of US troop deployment planning escalating conflict. Gold in post-crash recovery: spot ~$4,497, GLD $413.38 Mar 20 close. BTC $68,811 weekend. EUR/USD 1.1572.
fed_policy: Rates held at 3.5-3.75% (Mar 18). Dot plot: 1 cut in 2026, 1 in 2027. PCE inflation forecast raised to 2.7%. Dual pressure: oil-driven inflation vs softening labour. Next FOMC: May 6-7.
next_major_catalyst: US PCE Inflation (Mar 28), EU CPI Flash (Mar 31), OPEC+ Meeting (Apr 1), US ISM Manufacturing (Apr 1), US Non-Farm Payrolls (Apr 4).

strategy_adjustments.macro-volatility: Prime window. VIX 26.78 steady. S&P now below 200-day MA — regime has deepened. Key events next 10 days: PCE (Mar 28), EU CPI (Mar 31), OPEC+ (Apr 1), NFP (Apr 4). Pentagon deploying troops/Marines to Middle East escalates oil risk toward $105-110. Gold stabilising at $4,497 spot — watching $4,350 floor. EUR/USD 1.1572. Favour post-data directional trades; no pre-positioning within 12h of prints.
strategy_adjustments.earnings-momentum: Earnings heavy week: CHWY, CTAS, PAYX all report Mar 25 BMO; CCL reports Mar 27 BMO. Entry windows are tight (1-2 days pre-report). High-vol regime requires 4/4 beat history OR defensive compounder quality. LULU already reported Mar 17 — removed. Require confirmed catalyst still pending and exit before print.
strategy_adjustments.post-shock: High-vol regime continues to surface rebound candidates. GLD post-crash: spot $4,497 stabilising from $5,400 crash — upgrade if 2 consecutive closes above $4,500. Tech selloff and MDB base-building ongoing. Max 5 positions. Require 4/5 recovery signals before adding.
strategy_adjustments.crypto: BTC at $68,811 weekend (up from $68,301 Mar 20). Crypto F&G 10 (Extreme Fear) — contrarian bullish signal intact. BTC holding $65K-$68K demand zone. PCE Mar 28 is next directional catalyst. Max 3 positions. Altcoins LOW conviction only.
strategy_adjustments.pair-trades: Energy pairs (XOM/UAL, CVX/ALK) remain the highest-conviction regime plays with Pentagon escalation news. LMT/CCL: initiate short CCL leg only AFTER Mar 27 earnings. Gold stabilisation opens potential NEM/GLD or NEM/CCL pairs if GLD recovers. Max 2 pairs per short leg. Spread stops at -3%.

notes: Data sourced Mar 22, 2026.
